monitor.capture_what: The file path argument passed to open() at the sink, constructed from user-provided value/format parameters

oracle_check.condition_description: The file path passed to open() contains path traversal sequences (../) or absolute paths that escape the intended cache_dir, confirming path injection exploitation
oracle_check.raise_message_template: PATH_INJECTION: Tainted path traversal payload reached open() sink — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}

_meta.function_signature: def postprocess_image(format: str, value: BinaryExpr, cache_dir: str, watermark: BinaryExpr)
